steps.expected: Child B becomes a root tension

steps.expected: Parent deleted, remaining child C reparented to root
steps.observed: ✓ Deleted parent A, tree shows child B and child C both as roots

treeSnapshots: After move: 2 roots (parent A with 1 child, child B)
After rm: 2 roots (child B, child C - both reparented)

steps.expected: Valid JSON with tensions array and summary

steps.observed: Valid JSON with all 10 dynamics fields (structural_tension, structural_conflict, oscillation, resolution, phase, orientation, compensating_strategy, structural_tendency, assimilation_depth, neglect), mutations array

steps.expected: Common fields match across commands
steps.observed: Both have id, desired, actual, status, parent_id, created_at with consistent types and values

steps.expected: All 3 created as separate root tensions

steps.expected: Tree displays 3 roots with tree characters
steps.observed: Tree shows: ├── root 1, ├── root 2, └── root 3 with correct tree structure

frictions.description: Context command is not yet implemented - documented as 'coming soon'
frictions.resolution: Noted in report; context command validation blocked until implementation

frictions.description: Short ID prefixes can be ambiguous requiring longer prefixes
frictions.resolution: Used 8-9 character prefixes to uniquely identify tensions

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Format tests (VAL-FMT-001/002/003) confirm color controls work. Cross-area flows (VAL-CROSS-001/002/005/008) validate lifecycle, tree operations, JSON consistency, and multiple roots. Minor friction: context command not yet implemented.
